try { tauto }
      <

simp
    | hcons ŌÜ őď hőď ih =>
      rw [List.conj‚āā_cons_nonempty hőď]
      apply Deduction.mp
      ¬∑ -- Show that (ŌÜ ‚Üí (P ‚ąß Q)) is provable
        simp
        all_goals tauto
      ¬∑ -- Show that the hypothesis implies the conclusion
        simp at ih ‚äĘ
        all_goals tauto
  ¬∑ -- Second direction: if the implication holds, then ŌÜ is deducible from the list
    intro h
    induction h with
    | hnil => 
      simp
    | hsingle ŌÜ => 
      simp
    | hcons ŌÜ őď h1 ih =>
      rw [List.conj‚āā_cons_nonempty hőď]
      apply Deduction.andIR
      ¬∑ -- Show that ŌÜ is deducible
        simp
        all_goals tauto
      ¬∑ -- Show that the hypothesis implies the conclusion for the rest of the list
        simp at ih ‚äĘ
        all_goals tauto

theorem main : (Deduction Ax (List.toFinset őĪ) ŌÜ) ‚ÜĒ (Hilbert.F Ax) ‚äĘ (List.toFinset őĪ).conj‚āā ‚Üí ŌÜ := by 
  apply DT_list

      <

by
      have h3 : (Hilbert.F Ax) ‚äĘ (‚ÜĎőď.conj‚āā) ‚Üí ŌÜ := by
        simpa using h
      have h4 : (Hilbert.F Ax) ‚äĘ ŌÜ := by
        apply h3
        simp
      apply Deduction.of_proof h4
    assumption
